questions.subject: NSEC
questions.q:
The correct statement/s is/are
I. Soap is excellent for cleaning, $100 \%$ broken down by bacteria in rivers and hence has no further environmental damaging repercussions.
II. Soap forms an insoluble precipitate/scum when hard water containing calcium and magnesium ion is used.
III. Soaps can be used for cleansing under acidic solutions.
